preset.name: post-deploy
preset.description: Post-deploy audit: deterministic gates, bounded catalog sweep, and active durable override proof.

steps.boundary: This command proves deterministic current-target receipts for durable mix overrides. It does not prove subjective mix taste.

durableCurrentTarget.boundary: This command proves deterministic current-target receipts for durable mix overrides. It does not prove subjective mix taste.

nextAction: Post-deploy audit passed; durable overrides and bounded catalog guardrails are clean on the running target.
boundary: This batch proves deterministic app/audio guardrails and captures review packets. It does not prove subjective mix taste.
